mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, type, start_date, end_date, description, result, attachments, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO experiences (user_id, title, type, start_date, end_date, description, result, attachments) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{description}, #{result}, #{attachments})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM experiences WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
